title: Hormuz Transmission Validation
question: How is the event being transmitted across crude, gas, credit, dollar, airlines, defense, and energy equities?
why_chosen: Selected from real run `20260420_190248_HORMUZ_backfill` because it retains non-trivial structure (164 raw events, 107 regime flips). This validation page surfaces the top 10 markers to keep the read sparse and legible.
summary: Hormuz Transmission on 2026-04-20. Current regime is Pressure-led. 10 structural events are marked.
intended_read: Read as routing/anchor structure: which channels are transmitting support and which stress channels are vetoing transmission.

validation_notes.who_is_fighting_it: JETS Fuel-Cost Stress Response, Henry Hub Gas (FRED), and ITA Defense Conflict-Premium Anchor

validation_notes.failure_mode: If this reads as generic risk-on/risk-off instead of routing and anchors, semantics failed.
